title: Taylor-based Hamiltonian Simulation
description: Hamiltonian simulation using the Taylor series expansion approach.

params.help: Hamiltonian to be simulated, represented as a Hermitan matrix. Must be provided as a 2D array.
params.name: H

params.help: Total evolution time for the Hamiltonian simulation.
params.name: t

params.help: Degree of the approximating Taylor series.
params.name: d
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到50之间（如 10）
